name: ImonGre.tsn
title: Snow Internal Temperature on Land Ice
description: quantity averaged over ice sheet (grounded ice sheet and floating ice shelf) only. Needed to analyse the impact of downscaling methods
processing note:
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Dimensions - CMIP6:xgre ygre time CMIP7:latitude longitude time,
CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean where ice\_sheet CMIP7:depth: area: time: mean where ice_\__sheet (weighted by snow mass on ice\_sheet),
